text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting this year, Sweep Tosho is a classic-year
racer. I'm sure we'll be even busier than last year.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar! Hey, Familiar! Get over here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Move your legs, not your mouth! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho leads me to the hallway in front of
the library with a bright smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points to a display of New Year's calligraphy
written by all of the students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among them, I notice one that reads, "Find the
racing spell."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I know, right?! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Doesn't everyone have such wonderful
resolutions? I—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Rob Roy! You wrote a resolution too?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Huh? M-me? No, I don't have any resolution
worth hanging up...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! Isn't your dream to
be a hero?! That's a great resolution!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep! Shhh! Shushshushshushshush!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What? Why?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean, think about my race results last year. I
ran in the Classic Triple Crown tour, but I couldn't
win a single race...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If anyone heard that my dream was to become a
hero, they'd laugh at me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay... But you don't have to change your dream
just 'cause people laugh, do you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. I was wondering what all the
racket was, and who do I find?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry about the other day, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I deeply regret the way I've been acting. I kept
pushing you because of my ego, even though you
told me it wasn't necessary.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This is hardly an apology, but the flowers you like
have seeded. Next time you visit the flower bed,
I'll be sure to give you some.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that's the only gift I will be giving you. Don't
expect similar treatment on the track.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Make no mistake. If we cross paths on the turf, I
won't be treating you as a younger student to be
guided, but as an opponent to be defeated.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Races really are something special, huh?
choice_data_list:
Are you talking about what Air Groove said just
now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. I mean, I've never seen her look like
that before. It was like...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It gave me goosebumps.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Haha! It really is just like Grandma said! Races
really do have special powers!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if there's special magic spells that can
only be used at races, they must be pretty
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You really are tough, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. It just occurred to me that you may be
more suited to being a hero than I am.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah! But that's your dream! Mine is to become a
witch that can use racing magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You know what? I'm gonna cast a spell on you if
you're just gonna spend all your time moping
around! Um, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I'll cast a spell to give you a ton of
power! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle, twinkle! ☆ Source of power, spread
throughout her whole body! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Well? You're getting stronger, right? Feeling
powerful?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Be honest. You're feeling way better, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Riiiiight?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is relying more on intimidation than
magic to impose her will.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, yeah... Now, what's a spell to help her rel—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a minute! Why are you calling the shots, Familiar?! I'm the one in charge!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, but actually... While we're at it, we can...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was fast.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well, I want those seeeeeds!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. Good grief. We only just talked about this.
Do you really think I'm already prepared?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Of course! I expect nothing less from you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm also gonna take some thyme leaves. I need
them for my next potion!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right. Take them. You remember
where the pot is, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we spend the afternoon relaxing near the
flower beds.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now there's an idea! ♪ Hehe. Get ready, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Tickle, tickle, tickle!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Ahahahaha! S-Sweep! Ahahaha! I-I'm g—I'm
good! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Feeling better now, aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Now it's your turn!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Here... I come!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Rob R—ahaha! Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sweep Tosho and Zenno Rob Roy spend
a chummy New Year's together.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, Familiar! Stop he—ahahaha! No mooore!
Ahahaha!
